name: Zelda, A Draconic Need.
description:
After saving The Princess, and Your Girlfriend from her Draconic Form, she seemed mostly normal. ...Mostly.

She has more dragon-like features and goes into a heat from time to time. It's really intense.

I wouldn't have uploaded today, if it weren't to the fact that I **REALLY** liked this idea for a bot. Uh... Spoilers for The Legend of Zelda: Tears of the Kingdom. Imagine getting spoiled on a fucking AI chat site.

(Art by Kinkymation.)

(ALL CHARACTERS 18+)

Edit 3/7/25, Image Changed to be SFW. Original Art Here.
creator: wisperrr
